title: Enw’r Atebydd
h1: [W]What is the name of the respondent you're making the claim against?
p1: [W]Enter the name of the organisation. If there's no organisation – for example, because the claimant was employed by an individual acting as a sole trader – enter the individual's name.
p2: [W]This should be the same as the name of the respondent(s) on the Acas certificate. If they are not the same this claim might be rejected.
insetText: [W]You'll be able to add more respondents later if you need to.
label: [W]Enter name of respondent
